commits: 2d89d8c - bober(sprint-2): per-team memory namespacing of the lessons store

filesChanged.description: Exported memoryDir/lessonPath/indexPath with optional namespace?; centralized namespace->subdir rule in memoryDir (undefined/''/programming -> .bober/memory/, else -> .bober/memory/<ns>/); threaded namespace through appendLesson, loadLessonIndex, loadLesson.
Added namespace? to retrieveRelevantLessons opts; forwarded to loadLessonIndex.
Added resolveDefaultNamespace (loadConfig+loadTeam, non-fatal); threaded ns through all 4 call sites; fixed show's hardcoded path to use memoryDir.
Added memoryNamespace? to ChatSessionOptions + instance field; buildMemoryDistill threads namespace to loadLessonIndex/loadLesson.

notes: distill.ts NOT modified — curator finding confirmed: distill() is pure; the real appendLesson is in cli/commands/memory.ts. programming '' sentinel -> undefined via `|| undefined` -> existing .bober/memory/ path (no migration, no subdir).
